title: Param Sundari

subTitle: A teen plots his own kidnapping to scam his father, but when an unhinged cop takes the case, the unsuspecting kidnappers find themselves in a spiraling chaos.

title: Raj Mahal
subTitle: Living a carefree life along with his alcoholic uncle, a man's life takes a turn when he falls in love with a woman, who, unbeknownst to him, is protected by a spirit.

subTitle: Two rival dance groups, Street Dancer and Rule Breakers, despise each other and participate in a dance battle. Later, they decide to join hands for a greater cause.

subTitle: Ruhaan, a fake ghost-chaser, takes a job at a spooky castle and finds out about a bad plan by tricky priests. His trip becomes a funny but scary ride with lots of surprises and frights.

subTitle: Saravanan, an undercover officer disguised as a PT master, confronts merciless criminals, unearths their fraud and recruits school personnel to dismantle their operation.

title: Top Gear
subTitle: Arjun, a taxi driver, finds himself in trouble when one of his customers turns out to be a drug dealer. When the kingpin kidnaps Arjun's wife, he strives to save her.

title: Baahubali
subTitle: Raised by a tribe, a young man sets out to help his lady love rescue an enslaved princess of a kingdom that is ruled by a tyrannical king. In doing so, he soon discovers his true identity.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: Animal
subTitle: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.

title: Mumbai Saga

subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

subTitle: Binny, a rebellious teenager in London, shares nothing in common with her traditional grandfather rooted in rural Bihar. However, a connection forms when circumstances force their worlds to collide.

title: Robinhood
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood thrives on stealing from the rich. However, he reluctantly becomes a bodyguard for a high-profile client due to unforeseen circumstances.

subTitle: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

title: Kantara
subTitle: When greed paves the way for betrayal, scheming and murder, a young tribal reluctantly dons the traditions of his ancestors to seek justice.

title: Turbo
subTitle: Jose, a jeep driver, steps into a complex situation with his friend and a corrupt scheme. However, he helps uncover the truth, stands up to threats and seeks justice for his friend.

title: Sinam
subTitle: A police sub-inspector investigates the sudden disappearance of his beloved wife. When he finds out what happened to her, he sets out to exact revenge against the culprit.

title: Shaitaan
subTitle: A family's farmhouse holiday turns sinister when an enigmatic guest possesses their daughter, leaving them at his mercy.

title: Waltair Veerayya
subTitle: A desperate smuggler finds himself strapped for cash. Later, when an agent offers him a fortune to extradite a notorious drug lord from Malaysia, he accepts only to face a world of betrayal.

title: MLA Ka Power
subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.
